name: listCampaigns
description:
Retrieve and display Facebook campaigns. IMPORTANT:
1. Show campaign names to the user
2. Store campaign details in function output as JSON
3. When user selects a campaign by name, use the stored data to get the ID
4. Users should never need to provide campaign IDs directly

ad_account_id.description: The ID of the ad account from which to list campaigns. MUST be obtained first through listAccounts command.
